mapper.select:
SELECT paper_id as paperId, create_time as createTime,`row` FROM ai_calculate_paper WHERE paper_id in
#{id}

SELECT distinct b.id as id, b.name as keywordName, b.importantlevelid as importLevel, b.datavalue as dataValue FROM cm_kwadict a JOIN cm_keywords b ON a.keywordid = b.id WHERE a.courseId = #{courseId}

SELECT distinct b.id as id, b.name as abilityName, b.importantlevel as importLevel, b.datavalue as dataValue FROM cm_kwadict a JOIN cm_getability b ON a.abilityid = b.id WHERE a.courseId = #{courseId}
SELECT distinct id, pId as pid, orderNum, name as unitName, dataValue, nodeType as type FROM cm_course_unit WHERE courseId = #{courseId}

SELECT a.userId as userId, a.proId as proName, a.obsName as obsName, a.userName as userName, a.rowNo as rowNo, b.stuno as stuNo FROM pm_test_students a JOIN sm_student b ON a.userId = b.usersid WHERE a.testId = #{testId} ORDER BY a.rowNo ASC

SELECT b.id AS id, b.name AS keywordName, b.importantlevelid as importLevel, b.datavalue as dataValue FROM (SELECT kwaId, kwaName FROM tm_testquelib_kwa WHERE libId IN (SELECT libId FROM pm_testpaper_questions WHERE paperId IN
#{item.paperId} )) temp JOIN cm_kwadict a ON a.id = temp.kwaId JOIN cm_keywords b ON b.id = a.keywordid

SELECT b.id as id, b.name as abilityName, b.importantlevel as importLevel, b.datavalue as dataValue FROM (SELECT kwaId, kwaName FROM tm_testquelib_kwa WHERE libId IN (SELECT libId FROM pm_testpaper_questions WHERE paperId IN
#{item.paperId} )) temp JOIN cm_kwadict a ON a.id = temp.kwaId JOIN cm_getability b ON b.id = a.abilityid
SELECT professionName FROM cm_course WHERE id = #{courseId}
SELECT courseId FROM cm_classroom WHERE id = #{classroomId}
